Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_GET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The {f 4 4 1 37 1 0} I put in here[n]a while ago is sufficiently chilled...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_GET2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't really feel like eating anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The fridge is stuffed full of food and[n]ingredients. There's no space for a taiyaki.[n]{f 1 1}
